title: Enhanced Experiences
description: Need more xp? This mod's for you
body:
## Enhanced Experiences

Adds a new sword enchantment called Inquisitive which has 5 levels.

![Inquisitive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4822e68f6585356ec2f4613347d81db9ff22a146.png)

## How to get?

You can obtain the enchantment from villagers and enchanting table level 30, it's a rare enchantment. (only available from villagers in 1.21)

## What does it do?

Simply increases the amount of exp you get from killing mobs
